candidate_service_files.preview:
[Unit]
Description=Tokenoskobi/Coinoskobi Active Panel 8096
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/active_panel_8096/current
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 -m http.server 8096 --bind 0.0.0.0
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=3

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

[Unit]
Description=Tokenoskobi News Radar Refresh Runner
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/tools/news_radar_refresh_runner_v1.py
TimeoutStartSec=70
Nice=5
IOSchedulingClass=best-effort
StandardOutput=append:/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/logs/news_radar/news_radar_refresh.log
StandardError=append:/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/logs/news_radar/news_radar_refresh.err.log

[Unit]
Description=Run Tokenoskobi News Radar Refresh every 20 minutes

[Timer]
OnActiveSec=20min
OnUnitActiveSec=20min
AccuracySec=30s
RandomizedDelaySec=0
Persistent=false
Unit=tokenoskobi-news-radar-refresh.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
